_comment: Class D (recursion-guard). A protocol slot that recurses into a contained Python object (calling repr/str/hash/compare on it, threading `vm`) without entering a recursion guard overflows the NATIVE stack on a deep/cyclic object → SIGSEGV (not a catchable RecursionError). RustPython guards repr with `ReprGuard` and the frame depth with `with_recursion`; str/eq/hash on the same containers are the gap. Known-open upstream umbrella #2796.
